tagline: Sort by hidden measure fields: Users can now sort charts by a different measure field that does not visually appear on the bar chart.
what_it_does: Sort by hidden measure fields: Users can now sort charts by a different measure field that does not visually appear on the bar chart. Map legend position control: Authors can now change map legend positions. Safari cross filtering fix: Fixed an issue where cross filtering was not working in Safari.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Sort by hidden measure fields: Users can now sort charts by a different measure field that does not visually appear on the bar chart.
